title: hydrocotyle pusilla
intro: Hydrocotyle pusilla, also known as Indian pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle pusilla include improved cognitive function, enhanced memory, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and depression. It can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as tea, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
